chunks.heading: Format — Alignment and Capitalization
chunks.text: Format all lines of the address with a uniform left margin. Uppercase letters are preferred on all lines of the address block.

chunks.heading: Format — Font and OCR Readability
chunks.text: Lowercase lettering in various typefaces is acceptable provided that the fonts and typefaces satisfy Postal Service guidelines for optical character recognition (OCR) readability. See the Domestic Mail Manual (DMM) for specific OCR readability requirements; these apply to qualify for automation postal rates, and other rate categories may have additional requirements.
